abstract: A parameter that gradually updates the amount of audio signal that passes through to the output.
overview:
## Discussion

Use this property to fade reverb effects into a spatial mixer’s output.

For example, to begin with no reverb and gradually enable it, start by silencing reverb by setting the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialCategory/lateReverb] entry’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipelineEntry/sendLevel] to `0`. Begin the fade by calling [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameter/fade(value:duration:)] on this property with an argument of `1`.

# sendLevelMetaParameterDefinition

**Instance Property**

A parameter that gradually updates the amount of audio signal that passes through to the output.

## Declaration

```swift
var sendLevelMetaParameterDefinition: PHASENumberMetaParameterDefinition? { get set }
```

## Discussion

Use this property to fade reverb effects into a spatial mixer’s output.

For example, to begin with no reverb and gradually enable it, start by silencing reverb by setting the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialCategory/lateReverb] entry’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipelineEntry/sendLevel] to `0`. Begin the fade by calling [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameter/fade(value:duration:)] on this property with an argument of `1`.
title: sendLevelMetaParameterDefinition
